name: Rum Cake with Rum Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake mix and pudding mix.
2. Add the rum and oil to the mixture.
3. Add one egg at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Pour the batter into a 10-inch Bundt pan.
5. Bake for about 1 hour at 350°F.
6. Remove the cake from the pan and let it cool slightly.
7. Poke holes in the top of the warm cake.
8. Pour the hot rum glaze over the cake while it is still warm.
GLAZE:
1/4 cup water
1 cup sugar
1/2 cup butter (melted)
2 oz rum
